name: AppSamurai
description: AppSamurai — AI mobile user acquisition and app growth platform with campaign management, fraud prevention and app store performance tracking for advertisers and publishers.

seo.title: AppSamurai — App Growth Tooling (ASO)
seo.meta_description: AppSamurai: AppSamurai — AI mobile user acquisition and app growth platform with campaign management, fraud prevention and app store performance tracking for ad

when_to_use: AI-managed UA campaigns across multiple ad networks with fraud guard
Tracking App Store keyword rank alongside paid acquisition metrics
Running cross-network CPI campaigns for publisher and advertiser teams
Fraud prevention integrated into mobile UA campaign management

pros: AI-powered UA with campaign management built in
cons: UA platform first, ASO is secondary
Less transparent than self-serve UA tools
review.verdict: Solid managed UA platform with bolt-on growth features, not a pure ASO workbench.
review.best_for: Growth teams wanting managed UA plus fraud protection
review.not_for: Marketers who just want keyword and metadata tooling
